description_long: This skateboard features a sleek, rectangular deck with rounded ends and a smooth, dark surface, likely made of layered wood with a black grip tape on top. The deck is supported by two sets of trucks, each fitted with a pair of small, cylindrical wheels in a reddish hue. The wheels are classic in shape, suitable for street use, and are mounted beneath the deck with standard trucks that are partially visible from the side. The edges of the deck reveal a natural wood color, contrasting with the black upper surface. There are no visible graphics, logos, or text on the deck or wheels, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality for urban skateboarding environments.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black deck, natural wood edges, and red street wheels, designed for urban use. The deck is plain with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, natural wood edges, and both red wheels beneath.
description_view_1: End view displaying the width of the deck and the black grip tape surface, with one wheel partially visible underneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the full length of the deck and both red wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, mirroring view 1, showing the width of the deck and the black grip tape surface.
attribute_wheel_type: street, red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard trucks, metallic color, standard mounting, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
